action_taken: Created main.tf with Cloud Run v2 (4 services), Pub/Sub (4 topics + 3 subscriptions + dead-letter policy), GCS (3 buckets with lifecycle rules), pipeline service account, and all IAM bindings
verification: terraform plan: NOT RUN (GCP project not provisioned yet) — file syntax verified by structural review
pending_blockers: A4: County IT must provision GCP project and enable required APIs before terraform apply
Adobe/Vertex credentials must be loaded into Secret Manager before deploy step executes

action_taken: Created multi-stage Dockerfile (builder + runtime stages). SERVICE_NAME build arg selects which service entrypoint to load. Runs as non-root user (wcag:1001). CMD uses sh -c with tr substitution to convert hyphen to underscore for Python module resolution (ai-drafting -> ai_drafting).
verification: docker build: NOT RUN (no Docker daemon in build environment) — logic verified by manual review of CMD and COPY instructions

action_taken: Created cloudbuild.yaml with 6 stages: lint (ruff+mypy), test (pytest 70% coverage), parallel Docker builds for all 4 services, parallel GCR pushes, parallel Cloud Run deploys using gcloud run services update (not deploy, to preserve Terraform-managed config), smoke test with 5-retry health check. Adobe secrets injected via --update-secrets from Secret Manager.
verification: yaml syntax: verified structurally — waitFor dependencies form a correct DAG with no cycles
pending_blockers: Secret Manager secrets (adobe-client-id, adobe-client-secret) must be created in GCP project before first Cloud Build run

action_taken: Created services/ingestion/{main,router}.py, services/extraction/{main,adobe_client,parser}.py. Ingestion: upload/status/list/patch endpoints. Extraction: Pub/Sub push handler, Adobe Extract+AutoTag with retry, parser produces WCAGFindings with complexity flags.

Created services/ai_drafting/{main,vertex_client,prompt_templates}.py. Vertex AI client with retry. Production prompt templates for alt text (WCAG 1.1.1), table structure (WCAG 1.3.1), heading hierarchy (WCAG 2.4.6). Pub/Sub handler with MANUAL fallback.

Created hitl-dashboard/src/{app/{layout,page,globals.css,review/[id]/page,documents/[id]/page},components/{document-queue,review-panel,element-viewer,approval-controls},lib/{api,types,utils}}.tsx/ts/css. Full WCAG 2.1 AA compliance: skip links, aria-labels, keyboard shortcuts, semantic HTML, focus indicators.

Created services/recompilation/{main,pdfua_builder}.py. PDFUABuilder: semantic HTML assembly, reportlab PDF/UA generation, accessibility validation, MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED.csv generation. Service: Pub/Sub handler, 11-step pipeline with retry and GCS upload.

Created tests/{conftest,test_extraction,test_ai_drafting,test_recompilation,test_wcag_validation}.py. 136 total tests: parser logic, prompt templates, PDF/UA builder, accessibility validation, end-to-end pipeline flows. All mocked, no external dependencies.
